analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet commemorates the first session of the Russian Academy of Science in 1726 in St. Petersburg, portraying it as the beginning of Russia’s academic science, and notes its dual research and educational roles. Evaluation: RU1 (West immoral) – not referenced. RU2 (alternative system) – no mention of international order or non-Western cooperation. RU3 (benevolent partner) – no partnership or peace/development claims. RU4 (Russian history is admirable) – yes; it highlights a historical milestone and Russia’s contribution to science and education in an admiring tone. RU5 (world’s forefront) – no current achievements or superiority claims. RU6 (interesting culture/nature/heritage) – not about culture/nature travel appeal; focus is historical-scientific milestone. Conclusion: The tweet promotes RU4.
